capabilities.name: Asset registration + acquisition JE
capabilities.verify: asset registration with acquisition journal entry

capabilities.name: Disposal w/ gain/loss JE
capabilities.verify: asset disposal with gain/loss journal entry

capabilities.name: Impairment/revaluation
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. Skill: revalue_fixed_asset live via MCP gateway — impairment (NBV 12000→10000 kr: Dt 7720 / Cr 1219, JE 34d5bfcd) AND reversal (950000→1000000 öre: Dt 1219 / Cr 7788, JE 06cf1f82, capped at cost). History in asset_revaluations. UI: Revalue/Impair dialog on FixedAssetsPage (Lovable build 2026-07-07).

capabilities.name: Lease accounting (IFRS16/ASC842)
capabilities.verify: asset impairment/revaluation shipped separately; no lease_contracts/ROU-asset model yet
capabilities.notes: Deliberately deferred (round 4): needs lease table + PV/amortization RPCs — a full epic, not a flip. BAS/K2 SMEs rarely require IFRS 16.

capabilities.name: Asset component breakdown
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. fixed_assets.parent_asset_id (self-parent CHECK-rejected) + update_fixed_asset(p_parent_asset_id) live via MCP gateway — UOP press linked as component of SYD machine; response returns nested components[]. UI: Edit dialog parent-asset select + 'component of' hint (Lovable build 2026-07-07).
capabilities.notes: Components depreciate independently (own method/life) — matches Odoo's asset-per-component model.

capabilities.name: Sum-of-years/unit-of-production
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. sum_of_years: registered 36-mo/12000 kr asset → schedule 500 kr/mo year 1 (3/6 SYD fraction) via compute_monthly_depreciation(asset, period). units_of_production: post_units_depreciation live via gateway (250 units/10000 → 15000 öre, JE posted, units_depreciated tracked; monthly sweep skips UOP). UI: method select + Post-units dialog (Lovable build 2026-07-07).
capabilities.notes: CHECK constraint now allows straight_line|declining|sum_of_years|units_of_production. Sweep-idempotency unique index scoped to automatic entries so UOP/manual postings don't collide (fixed during round 4).

capabilities.name: Asset location/maintenance tracking
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. fixed_assets.location + update_fixed_asset(p_location) live via MCP gateway ('Factory B'); returned in get_depreciation_schedule rows. Maintenance link pre-existed: equipment.fixed_asset_id (maintenance module). UI: location field + column (Lovable build 2026-07-07).

capabilities.name: Manual depreciation adjustment
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. Skill: post_manual_depreciation(25000 öre) live via MCP gateway → depreciation_entries row flagged is_manual + JE be35f020, accumulated updated; over-depreciation below salvage rejected with remaining-base error. UI: Manual depreciation dialog (Lovable build 2026-07-07).

capabilities.name: Depreciation schedule report
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-07. Skill: get_depreciation_schedule live via MCP gateway → per-asset forward monthly rows {period, amount_cents, accumulated_cents, nbv_cents} until fully depreciated (SYD asset verified 3 rows @50000). UI: schedule dialog on FixedAssetsPage (Lovable build 2026-07-07).
capabilities.notes: Computed on demand (no schedule table); UOP estimated as even spread with estimated:true flag.
